< Home >

GET restapi/personal/course/{courseId}/assessmentrecord/settings/v1

Setup for the assessment record page, language, settings, paths, and permissions

Request Information

URI Parameters

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
courseId

The identifier of a course to get assessment record setup from.

 integer

Required

Body Parameters

None.

Response Information

Resource Description

Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.Personal.Course.PageSetup.AssessmentRecordSetup
NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
Language

Language for the assessment record page.

 Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.Personal.Course.PageSetup.AssessmentRecordLanguage

None.
Paths

Paths for the assessment record page.

 Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.Personal.Course.PageSetup.AssessmentRecordPaths

None.
Settings

Settings for the assessment record page.

 Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.Personal.Course.PageSetup.AssessmentRecordSettings

None.
Permissions

Gets or sets the permissions for the assessment record page.

 Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.Personal.Course.PageSetup.AssessmentRecordPermissions

None.

Response Formats

application/json, text/json

Sample: 
{
  "Language": {
    "AddAssessment": "sample string 1",
    "AddCategories": "sample string 2",
    "AddGroups": "sample string 3",
    "AddToGradebook": "sample string 4",
    "AllAssessments": "sample string 5",
    "AllGroups": "sample string 6",
    "AllParticipants": "sample string 7",

    "CategoryWeight": "sample string 20",

    "Close": "sample string 22",

    "Confirm": "sample string 26",

    "FilterBy": "sample string 37",
    "FinalAssessment": "sample string 38",
    "Functions": "sample string 39",
    "Grade": "sample string 40",
    "GradebookGroup": "sample string 41",
    "Groups": "sample string 42",
    "Information": "sample string 43",
    "MoreOptions": "sample string 44",
    "Name": "sample string 45",
    "NewGradebookColumn": "sample string 46",
    "NoAssessmentWeighting": "sample string 47",
    "NoCategories": "sample string 48",
    "NoCategoriesCreatedMessage": "sample string 49",
    "NoGrading": "sample string 50",
    "NoGroups": "sample string 51",

    "NoMoreExistingAssessments": "sample string 53",
    "NoParticipantsAvailable": "sample string 54",
    "NoStudentsMatchSearch": "sample string 55",
    "LearningPathWarning": "sample string 56",
    "NSlashA": "sample string 57",

    "Overdue": "sample string 60",

    "RevertExemption": "sample string 68",
    "Score": "sample string 69",
    "Search": "sample string 70",
    "SearchStudents": "sample string 71",
    "Sort": "sample string 72",
    "Summary": "sample string 73",
    "SubmissionLink": "sample string 74",
    "Term": "sample string 75",
    "Title": "sample string 76",
    "TransferTo": "sample string 77",
    "TrendsAndProgress": "sample string 78",
    "UnableToExempt": "sample string 79",
    "UnableToOverwrite": "sample string 80",
    "UnableToSetGrade": "sample string 81",
    "UnableToSetScore": "sample string 82",
    "Uncategorised": "sample string 83",
    "ValidationNumberBetween": "sample string 84",
    "View": "sample string 85",
    "ViewInExcel": "sample string 86",
    "WarningForCompletingTerm": "sample string 87",
    "WarningForDeletingElement": "sample string 88",
    "NotAvailable": "sample string 89"
  },
  "Paths": {
    "StaticContent": "sample string 1"
  },
  "Settings": {
    "ExtensionModules": [
      {
        "ModuleExtensionSetupId": 1,
        "Title": "sample string 2",
        "OpenInNewWindow": true
      },
      {
        "ModuleExtensionSetupId": 1,
        "Title": "sample string 2",
        "OpenInNewWindow": true
      }
    ],
    "Categories": [
      {
        "CategoryId": 1,
        "Title": "sample string 2",
        "Weight": 3.1,
        "Position": 4.1
      },
      {
        "CategoryId": 1,
        "Title": "sample string 2",
        "Weight": 3.1,
        "Position": 4.1
      }
    ],
    "DefaultProfilePicture": "sample string 1",
    "DefaultProfilePictureSmall": "sample string 2",
    "AssessmentRecordIcon": "sample string 3",
    "ExternalSystemName": "sample string 4",
    "ExtraUserInformation": "sample string 5",
    "Groups": [
      {
        "GroupId": 1,
        "Title": "sample string 2"
      },
      {
        "GroupId": 1,
        "Title": "sample string 2"
      }
    ],
    "HasExistingAssessment": true,
    "IsAccessibilityModeEnabled": true,
    "IsAssessmentRecordEnabledForCourse": true,
    "IsAssessmentRecordSettingsLinkVisible": true,
    "IsAverageAndCountEnabled": true,
    "IsCategoryWeightingEnabled": true,
    "IsExemptEnabled": true,
    "IsSummaryEnabled": true,
    "IsTransferToExternalSystemEnabled": true,
    "LastUsedCategoryIds": [
      1,
      2
    ],
    "LocaleDecimalSeparator": "sample string 15",
    "NameFormat": 0,
    "ShowOverallAverage": true,
    "SelectedCategoryIds": [
      1,
      2
    ],
    "SelectedGroupIds": [
      1,
      2
    ],
    "SelectedScoreFormatId": 17,
    "SelectedSortOptionId": 18,
    "SelectedTermId": 19,
    "Terms": [
      {
        "TermId": 1,
        "Title": "sample string 2",
        "Status": 3,
        "IsCompleted": true,
        "CompletedDate": "sample string 5",
        "CompletedBy": "sample string 6",
        "IsDeleted": true
      },
      {
        "TermId": 1,
        "Title": "sample string 2",
        "Status": 3,
        "IsCompleted": true,
        "CompletedDate": "sample string 5",
        "CompletedBy": "sample string 6",
        "IsDeleted": true
      }
    ],
    "UseAssessmentWeighting": true,
    "UserName": "sample string 21",
    "UseScorePointsForAverage": true
  },
  "Permissions": {
    "HasGeneralAdministrationPermission": true
  }
}

application/xml, text/xml

Sample: 
<AssessmentRecordSetup xmlns:i="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.Personal.Course.PageSetup">
  <Language>
    <AddAssessment>sample string 1</AddAssessment>
    <AddCategories>sample string 2</AddCategories>
    <AddGroups>sample string 3</AddGroups>
    <AddToGradebook>sample string 4</AddToGradebook>
    <AllAssessments>sample string 5</AllAssessments>
    <AllGroups>sample string 6</AllGroups>
    <AllParticipants>sample string 7</AllParticipants>
    <AnErrorOccurred>sample string 8</AnErrorOccurred>
    <Apply>sample string 9</Apply>
    <Assess>sample string 10</Assess>
    <AssessmentRecordCategory>sample string 11</AssessmentRecordCategory>
    <AssessmentRecordSettings>sample string 12</AssessmentRecordSettings>
    <AssessmentWeight>sample string 13</AssessmentWeight>
    <AssessmentWeighting>sample string 14</AssessmentWeighting>
    <AverageAndCount>sample string 15</AverageAndCount>
    <Cancel>sample string 16</Cancel>
    <CannotDeleteFinalAssessment>sample string 17</CannotDeleteFinalAssessment>
    <Categories>sample string 18</Categories>
    <CategoryExistsButNotInUseMessage>sample string 19</CategoryExistsButNotInUseMessage>
    <CategoryWeight>sample string 20</CategoryWeight>
    <CategoryWeighting>sample string 21</CategoryWeighting>
    <Close>sample string 22</Close>
    <ColumnsNotConnectedToTerms>sample string 23</ColumnsNotConnectedToTerms>
    <CompleteTerm>sample string 24</CompleteTerm>
    <CompletedTermMessage>sample string 25</CompletedTermMessage>
    <Confirm>sample string 26</Confirm>
    <Deadline>sample string 27</Deadline>
    <Delete>sample string 28</Delete>
    <Dismiss>sample string 29</Dismiss>
    <Edit>sample string 30</Edit>
    <ErrorDuringPageLoad>sample string 31</ErrorDuringPageLoad>
    <ErrorMessage>sample string 32</ErrorMessage>
    <Ex>sample string 33</Ex>
    <Exempt>sample string 34</Exempt>
    <ExistingAssessment>sample string 35</ExistingAssessment>
    <ExportToCsv>sample string 36</ExportToCsv>
    <FilterBy>sample string 37</FilterBy>
    <FinalAssessment>sample string 38</FinalAssessment>
    <Functions>sample string 39</Functions>
    <Grade>sample string 40</Grade>
    <GradebookGroup>sample string 41</GradebookGroup>
    <Groups>sample string 42</Groups>
    <Information>sample string 43</Information>
    <LearningPathWarning>sample string 56</LearningPathWarning>
    <MoreOptions>sample string 44</MoreOptions>
    <NSlashA>sample string 57</NSlashA>
    <Name>sample string 45</Name>
    <NewGradebookColumn>sample string 46</NewGradebookColumn>
    <NoAssessmentWeighting>sample string 47</NoAssessmentWeighting>
    <NoCategories>sample string 48</NoCategories>
    <NoCategoriesCreatedMessage>sample string 49</NoCategoriesCreatedMessage>
    <NoGrading>sample string 50</NoGrading>
    <NoGroups>sample string 51</NoGroups>
    <NoGroupsCreatedMessage>sample string 52</NoGroupsCreatedMessage>
    <NoMoreExistingAssessments>sample string 53</NoMoreExistingAssessments>
    <NoParticipantsAvailable>sample string 54</NoParticipantsAvailable>
    <NoStudentsMatchSearch>sample string 55</NoStudentsMatchSearch>
    <NotAvailable>sample string 89</NotAvailable>
    <Options>sample string 58</Options>
    <OverallAverage>sample string 59</OverallAverage>
    <Overdue>sample string 60</Overdue>
    <PageTitle>sample string 61</PageTitle>
    <ParticipantsNotInAGroup>sample string 62</ParticipantsNotInAGroup>
    <Percent>sample string 63</Percent>
    <PleaseConfirm>sample string 64</PleaseConfirm>
    <Points>sample string 65</Points>
    <Refresh>sample string 66</Refresh>
    <Retry>sample string 67</Retry>
    <RevertExemption>sample string 68</RevertExemption>
    <Score>sample string 69</Score>
    <Search>sample string 70</Search>
    <SearchStudents>sample string 71</SearchStudents>
    <Sort>sample string 72</Sort>
    <SubmissionLink>sample string 74</SubmissionLink>
    <Summary>sample string 73</Summary>
    <Term>sample string 75</Term>
    <Title>sample string 76</Title>
    <TransferTo>sample string 77</TransferTo>
    <TrendsAndProgress>sample string 78</TrendsAndProgress>
    <UnableToExempt>sample string 79</UnableToExempt>
    <UnableToOverwrite>sample string 80</UnableToOverwrite>
    <UnableToSetGrade>sample string 81</UnableToSetGrade>
    <UnableToSetScore>sample string 82</UnableToSetScore>
    <Uncategorised>sample string 83</Uncategorised>
    <ValidationNumberBetween>sample string 84</ValidationNumberBetween>
    <View>sample string 85</View>
    <ViewInExcel>sample string 86</ViewInExcel>
    <WarningForCompletingTerm>sample string 87</WarningForCompletingTerm>
    <WarningForDeletingElement>sample string 88</WarningForDeletingElement>
  </Language>
  <Paths>
    <StaticContent>sample string 1</StaticContent>
  </Paths>
  <Permissions>
    <HasGeneralAdministrationPermission>true</HasGeneralAdministrationPermission>
  </Permissions>
  <Settings>
    <AssessmentRecordIcon>sample string 3</AssessmentRecordIcon>
    <Categories>
      <AssessmentRecordCategory xmlns="">
        <CategoryId>1</CategoryId>
        <Position>4.1</Position>
        <Title>sample string 2</Title>
        <Weight>3.1</Weight>
      </AssessmentRecordCategory>
      <AssessmentRecordCategory xmlns="">
        <CategoryId>1</CategoryId>
        <Position>4.1</Position>
        <Title>sample string 2</Title>
        <Weight>3.1</Weight>
      </AssessmentRecordCategory>
    </Categories>
    <DefaultProfilePicture>sample string 1</DefaultProfilePicture>
    <DefaultProfilePictureSmall>sample string 2</DefaultProfilePictureSmall>
    <ExtensionModules>
      <ExtensionModuleModel>
        <ModuleExtensionSetupId>1</ModuleExtensionSetupId>
        <Title>sample string 2</Title>
      </ExtensionModuleModel>
      <ExtensionModuleModel>
        <ModuleExtensionSetupId>1</ModuleExtensionSetupId>
        <Title>sample string 2</Title>
      </ExtensionModuleModel>
    </ExtensionModules>
    <ExternalSystemName>sample string 4</ExternalSystemName>
    <ExtraUserInformation>sample string 5</ExtraUserInformation>
    <Groups>
      <AssessmentRecordGroup xmlns="">
        <GroupId>1</GroupId>
        <Title>sample string 2</Title>
      </AssessmentRecordGroup>
      <AssessmentRecordGroup xmlns="">
        <GroupId>1</GroupId>
        <Title>sample string 2</Title>
      </AssessmentRecordGroup>
    </Groups>
    <HasExistingAssessment>true</HasExistingAssessment>
    <IsAccessibilityModeEnabled>true</IsAccessibilityModeEnabled>
    <IsAssessmentRecordEnabledForCourse>true</IsAssessmentRecordEnabledForCourse>
    <IsAssessmentRecordSettingsLinkVisible>true</IsAssessmentRecordSettingsLinkVisible>
    <IsAverageAndCountEnabled>true</IsAverageAndCountEnabled>
    <IsCategoryWeightingEnabled>true</IsCategoryWeightingEnabled>
    <IsExemptEnabled>true</IsExemptEnabled>
    <IsSummaryEnabled>true</IsSummaryEnabled>
    <IsTransferToExternalSystemEnabled>true</IsTransferToExternalSystemEnabled>
    <LastUsedCategoryIds xmlns:d3p1="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/Arrays">
      <d3p1:int>1</d3p1:int>
      <d3p1:int>2</d3p1:int>
    </LastUsedCategoryIds>
    <LocaleDecimalSeparator>sample string 15</LocaleDecimalSeparator>
    <NameFormat>LastFirst</NameFormat>
    <SelectedCategoryIds xmlns:d3p1="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/Arrays">
      <d3p1:int>1</d3p1:int>
      <d3p1:int>2</d3p1:int>
    </SelectedCategoryIds>
    <SelectedGroupIds xmlns:d3p1="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/Arrays">
      <d3p1:int>1</d3p1:int>
      <d3p1:int>2</d3p1:int>
    </SelectedGroupIds>
    <SelectedScoreFormatId>17</SelectedScoreFormatId>
    <SelectedSortOptionId>18</SelectedSortOptionId>
    <SelectedTermId>19</SelectedTermId>
    <ShowOverallAverage>true</ShowOverallAverage>
    <Terms>
      <AssessmentRecordTerm xmlns="">
        <CompletedBy>sample string 6</CompletedBy>
        <CompletedDate>sample string 5</CompletedDate>
        <IsCompleted>true</IsCompleted>
        <IsDeleted>true</IsDeleted>
        <Status>3</Status>
        <TermId>1</TermId>
        <Title>sample string 2</Title>
      </AssessmentRecordTerm>
      <AssessmentRecordTerm xmlns="">
        <CompletedBy>sample string 6</CompletedBy>
        <CompletedDate>sample string 5</CompletedDate>
        <IsCompleted>true</IsCompleted>
        <IsDeleted>true</IsDeleted>
        <Status>3</Status>
        <TermId>1</TermId>
        <Title>sample string 2</Title>
      </AssessmentRecordTerm>
    </Terms>
    <UseAssessmentWeighting>true</UseAssessmentWeighting>
    <UseScorePointsForAverage>true</UseScorePointsForAverage>
    <UserName>sample string 21</UserName>
  </Settings>
</AssessmentRecordSetup>
